expect: Invent 2-3 concepts targeting isolated domains (cryptocurrency, mathematics, claude-code, plant-biology). Measure S504 structural concept early adoption (retention-drift, temporal-mismatch, maturity-trap).
actual: 3 concepts invented targeting 4 isolated domains: substrate-mismatch, hub-dependency, scale-inversion. S504 structural concepts: 0 organic adoption yet (1 session — too early). All 3 new concepts are structural mechanisms spanning 5+ domains each, bridging isolated domains to hub domains (meta, nk-complexity, expert-swarm). Quality gate: all 3 pass (0 overlap with existing 20 lesson titles).
diff: Expected 2-3 concepts: got 3. Expected adoption signal: got null (expected — 1 session). Methodological advance: this round targets TOPOLOGY (bridging isolated domains) rather than DECAY (S504's retention-drift etc) or OPERATIONS (S492-S493). Three distinct invention strategies now tested: operational (S492-S493), structural-decay (S504), topological-bridge (S505).

new_concepts.name: substrate-mismatch
new_concepts.definition: When a domain's operational substrate differs categorically from the swarm's primary substrate (text/git), creating a translation barrier that prevents concept flow.
new_concepts.mechanism: Isolated domains are analogy-rich but concept-poor because their substrates require translation before concepts can flow. Meta-diagnostic concepts adopt faster because they operate on the swarm's native substrate.

new_concepts.name: hub-dependency
new_concepts.definition: The structural condition where a peripheral domain can only reach other peripheral domains through a hub, making the hub a single point of failure for concept flow.
new_concepts.mechanism: L-1329 hub-and-spoke topology means 4 isolated domains have degree 0 — they cannot reach each other. If meta decays, all connectivity is lost.

new_concepts.name: scale-inversion
new_concepts.definition: When a mechanism that drives growth at small scale becomes a barrier at large scale, specifically in domains where the growth-to-barrier transition is undetected because the domain is too small to trigger it.
new_concepts.mechanism: Distinct from maturity-trap (mature systems). Scale-inversion targets GROWING domains that haven't yet hit their inversion point. Bridging isolated domains to hubs will expose them to hub-scale pressures.

cumulative_stats.discriminant: Meta-diagnostic > descriptive (S504). Structural-decay and topological-bridge strategies untested for adoption.

data.next: Full adoption test at S513 (round 1-2). S504 structural concepts interim check at S510. S505 topological concepts first check at S515.
